title: Kundrathur Murugan Temple
tagline: Kundrathur Murugan Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kundrathur Murugan Temple is a Hindu temple located in Kundrathur, a suburb of Chennai in the Kancheepuram district of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Kundrathur Murugan Temple is a Hindu temple located in Kundrathur, a suburb of Chennai in the Kancheepuram district of Tamil Nadu. According to Hindu mythology, Lord Subramaniar (Murugan) stayed on the hill during his travels from Tiruporur to Tiruttanigai. This place is also known as South Thanigai, as Lord Subramaniar is depicted facing the north, towards Thanigai.

topPlaces.name: Kundrathur
topPlaces.description: Kundrathur is a town located in the Chennai Metropolitan Area and the headquarters of Kundrathur taluk in Kanchipuram District. It is the birthplace of Sekkizhar, a well-known poet-saint who authored the Periyapuranam.

topPlaces.name: Kundrathur Nageswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kundrathur Nageswarar Temple, also known as Vada Thirunageswaram, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the neighbourhood of Kundrathur in Chennai, India. The temple was built in the 12th century by the Shivite saint Sekkilar and is modelled on the Thirunageswaram temple at Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Kundrathur Hill
topPlaces.description: The Subramaniyasvami Hill, popularly known as the Kundrathur Hill is a hillock located 5 kilometres (3.1 miles) from the Greater Chennai Corporation (GCC) limits in the Kundrathur taluk of Kanchipuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The town of Kundrathur known for its Kundrathur Murugan Temple occupies the summit of the hill.

topPlaces.name: Thirumudivakkam
topPlaces.description: Thirumudivakkam is a south-western suburb of Chennai metropolitan city, Tamil Nadu. This area belongs to Sriperumbudur taluk, Kanchipuram district.

topPlaces.name: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research
topPlaces.description: The Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research (MAHER), commonly referred to as Meenakshi University, is a private deemed-to-be-university for mainly medical science in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.

image.alt: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research

topPlaces.name: Sikkarayapuram
topPlaces.description: Sikkarayapuram, also known as Chikkarayapuram, is part of the Mangadu municipality and located in west of Chennai, India Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kovur, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Kovur is a western suburb of Chennai, India. It is located in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and is situated at a distance of about 5 kilometers from Porur on the Porur-Kundrathur Road.

topPlaces.name: Kovur Sundareswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sundareswarar Temple at Kovur, a suburb of Chennai, India is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva. Constructed in about 965 CE, the presiding deity of the temple is Sundareswarar, a form of Shiva and the presiding goddess is Soundarambikai.

The Subramaniyasvami Hill, popularly known as the Kundrathur Hill is a hillock located 5 kilometres (3.1 miles) from the Greater Chennai Corporation (GCC) limits in the Kundrathur taluk of Kanchipuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The town of Kundrathur known for its Kundrathur Murugan Temple occupies the summit of the hill.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kundrathur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kundrathur Murugan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kundrathur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kundrathur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kundrathur Murugan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kundrathur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kundrathur Murugan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kundrathur Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kundrathur, Kundrathur Nageswarar Temple, Kundrathur Hill, Thirumudivakkam, Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research.
